heading: Today
text: Mostly sunny and warmer.  Highs in the 70s, some low 80s in the warmer valleys west and south.  Winds light, varying from west to south up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear.  Lows in the 50s, some 40s in the cool spots.  Winds light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Sunshine, mixing with a few clouds north later in the day.  Quite warm.  Highs in the low to mid 80s, a few upper 70 over the higher terrain north, and upper 80s in the warmer valleys.  Light winds, becoming west to southwest near 10 mph.
